title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. fruticetorum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. fruticetorum is a subspecies of the Hieracium sabaudum plant, commonly known as the yellow hawkweed. It is a perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) with medicinal properties derived from its leaves, flowers, and roots. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium sabaudum subsp. fruticetorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
